headline: Vint Cerf Steps Down After Two Decades at Google
lede: The co-architect of the TCP/IP protocol concludes a storied tenure as chief internet evangelist. His departure marks a symbolic transition as the industry shifts its focus toward standardizing communication for autonomous AI agents.

headline: Visualizing Coding Agent Sessions in Three Dimensions
lede: Mindwalk transforms raw session logs into spatial traces that map agent activity across a codebase. By rendering logic paths as light, it helps developers demystify the black-box operations of modern coding assistants.

headline: Mesh LLM Brings Peer-to-Peer AI to Local Hardware
lede: By leveraging the iroh networking toolkit, users can now pool local compute resources into a unified inference API. This approach sidesteps the centralized costs of big-tech clouds through an authenticated mesh of peer-to-peer connections.

headline: A Native Python Implementation for Protocol Buffers
lede: The new protobuf-py library trades the opaque wrapping of standard C-based runtimes for idiomatic Python objects. It promises full specification compliance and native performance acceleration without the usual legacy baggage.

headline: Cataloging the Tools of Character-Based Digital Art
lede: Tracing the lineage of text-based design from early VGA utilities to modern Minecraft-inspired banners reveals the persistence of constrained creative mediums. This survey examines how specialized software preserves specific aesthetic workflows across the history of digital expression.

headline: Recursive Agent Loops in One Hundred Lines of Lisp
lede: The homoiconic nature of Lisp offers a unique framework for building self-modifying agents that define their own functions at runtime. By treating skills as re-hydrated memories, developers can move beyond static tool definitions.

headline: Ant JS Attempts an All-in-One JavaScript Runtime
lede: Ant arrives with a nine-megabyte binary, promising built-in sandboxing and a self-contained registry. Its ambitious scope aims to simplify deployment, though questions remain regarding its maturity compared to established standards.

headline: Inside the Circular Financial Web of the GPU Boom
lede: Hyperscalers and GPU providers are entangled in a complex web of debt and capacity buybacks. The financial viability of this infrastructure expansion hinges on the stability of these deeply leveraged, interdependent partnerships.

headline: Rebuilding the Game Boy Experience with RISC-V
lede: RISCBoy serves as a fully documented case study in implementing custom silicon on FPGA hardware. It bridges the gap between vintage gaming aesthetics and modern, open-source hardware synthesis toolchains.

headline: Digital Illustration Within the 9front Operating System
lede: The 9front ecosystem prioritizes a file-based, minimalist philosophy that challenges modern expectations for creative tooling. This guide reveals how users navigate these unique constraints to generate art.
pullquote: The idiosyncratic nature of 9front turns every creative workflow into an act of computational archaeology.
